index.noVm: No VM is available, please create one in the upper left corner
index.fieldRequired2: Only letters, numbers, and hyphens are allowed, and the first character cannot be a hyphen.

logs.pleaseSelectDate: Please select start and end date
logs.clearLog: Do you want to clear logs {0}. Cleared logs cannot be retrieved
logs.clearLogContent: The system will clear logs in the following time range
logs.total: Currently show {0} - {1} data, {2} item(s) in total

network.modalTips: The system provides virtual subnets in bridge, NAT, and host-only modes by default for VMs
network.editInfo: The current virtual subnet is associated with VM. Modifying the network information may affect the VM network
network.deleteInfo: Do you want to delete the virtual subnet "{0}"? It is associated with VM {1}. Deleting it may affect the VM network.
network.inputNameError2: Must use letters or numbers as the first character
network.bridgeTitle: To successfully switch the bridge mode, the following two conditions must be met. Please follow the instructions below:
network.stop4OperTitle: Perform the following operations on the above-running virtual machines:
network.networkNameDesc: The current virtual subnet is not available. Bridge Mode-MacVTap requires the NAS network port to be in normal mode (disable link aggregation or any bridge state), and Linux Bridge requires the NAS network to be in Network Bridging mode.
network.networkNameDesc2: The current library's proposed subnet is unavailable. Please ensure that the host machine's network card for the virtual subnet is consistent with the NAS network (Control Panel/Network Connections).
network.netTypeDesc:
Bridge Mode-MacVTap type: Higher transmission performance, but does not support communication between the virtual machine and the host machine.
Bridge Mode-Linux Bridge type: Supports communication between the virtual machine and the host machine.
NAT mode: The virtual machine will have a private subnet IP and can communicate with the host machine.
Host-only mode: The virtual machine is isolated from the host machine and the external network.
network.bridheGuide4MacVTap_1: 1. To switch to 'Bridge Mode-MacVTap', you need to
network.bridheGuide4MacVTap_2: unbind 'Link Aggregation' or 'Network Bridging' on the NAS network.
network.bridheGuide4Bridge_1: 1.To switch to "Bridge Mode-Linux Bridge," you need to
network.bridheGuide4Bridge_2: change the NAS network to "Network Bridging" mode.
network.bridheGuide2_1: 2. The network configuration will take effect after
network.bridheGuide2_3: (restarting the virtual machine will not work).
network.enableOneNetwork: Please enable at least one network
network.dhcpRangeError: End IP cannot be smaller than start IP in DCHP server, and both need to be within the subnet range
network.ipConfigInfo: The network will be assigned fixed parameters such as subnets and gateways. You can viwe the specific parameters of this network after creation
network.unknownNetworkCardDevice: Unknown or Network Card Device Not Present
network.mapPhysicalNetworkTips: If this setting is changed, associated virtual machine network must take effect after shutdown.

vm.snapshotLimit: Failed to create snapshots. The number of VM snapshots reached the limit (10)

vm.resumeSnapshotConfirm: The virtual machine will not be at its current state after restoring the snapshot. Do you want to restore to the specified snapshot?
vm.shareLinkInvalid: Invalid link, please enable UGREENlink in Control Panel > Device Connection.
vm.pleaseOpenUgreenLink: Please enable UGREENlink in the Control Panel > Device  Connection.
vm.generateShareLinkFail: Failed to create shared links. The number of VM shared link reached the limit (3)
vm.changeDiskTypeTip: Changing the hard disk type may affect the read and write perfomance of disk data.
vm.changeNetworkTypeTip: Changing the network type may affect the virtual machine network.
vm.firstLetter: Must use letters or numbers as the first character
vm.saveFail: Failed to save. Please check the logs
vm.guideWin: It is recommended that you install performance optimization tools for Windows-type virtual machines.
vm.noSupportModify: The initial image does not support modification.
vm.networkInvalid: Network associated with the current virtual machine is invalid. Please check in network management.
vm.memoryOverload: The total memory of NAS system must be larger than the configured memory of the currently running virtual machines. Besides, additional 512 MB of available memory is required for NAS system.
vm.memoryLow: The available memory of NAS system must be larger than the configured memory of the currently running virtual machines. Besides, additional 512 MB of available memory is required for NAS system.
vm.bootTypeOptionTip: The running VM does not support taking snapshots if this type is selected.
vm.generateSnapshotTip: UEFI-based VMs cannot create snapshots while running
vm.currentVmError: The current virtual machine is running abnormally. You can try to shut down and reboot it, or contact Technical Support.
vm.bootTypeTip: The virtual machine may not be working if this setting is changed
vm.diskTotalOver: Total capacity of disks exceeded the available space of: {0}
vm.usbPowerTip: After the virtual machine is started, the USB device will be unmapped from the host machine. Please ensure that there are no file transfer tasks on the USB device to avoid data loss.
vm.powerOnUsbError: Boot failed due to USB conflict. <notice-link>View log</notice-link>
